creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
(In reply to Kevin Bowling from comment #15)

Hi Kevin, thanks for that link. When I downloaded the latest big zip file (Release_29.4.zip) from Intel, it only seems to have I225. On the webpage
https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/download/15084/intel-ethernet-adapter-complete-driver-pack.html
 it links to 
https://downloadmirror.intel.com/838947/Release_29.4.zip

And mentions the i226 drivers. However, I only see I225 in the zip file. Are they known by something else ? And if I dont care about the boot code, can I just update the NVM ?
